WRAD ARMS by wriks is marked with CC0 1.0 Universal

Creating assets takes a considerable amount of my time. If you find my work helpful, please consider making a donation or becoming a supporter.
This can be done either through the itch page (https://wriks.itch.io/wrad-arms) or my ko-fi (https://ko-fi.com/wriks). Thank you!

Feel free to contact me at talkwithwriks@gmail.com.

Attribution: 'WRAD ARMS' by wriks: https://wriks.motorcycles

Ch4bby                                              - quality assurance
